tables.name: orders
tables.description: Checkout orders created by users before payment attempts are made.

tables.name: payment_attributes
tables.description: Payment rail and routing attributes such as UPI, cards, NEFT, and IMPS.

tables.name: payments
tables.description: Payment transaction attempts, including amount, status, rail, and event time.

tables.name: user_attributes
tables.description: User demographic, location, risk, and KYC attributes for segmentation.

tables.name: users
tables.description: Razorpay merchant or user accounts that initiate orders and payments.
